data.acceptance: 1) The Scan model selector in Settings → Agents displays exactly these five entries: 3.1-pro-preview, 3-flash-preview, 2.5-pro, 2.5-flash, 2.5-flash-lite. 2) No additional Gemini model options are added or removed outside this explicit replacement. 3) Existing behavior for selecting and saving a model is unchanged aside from the updated model names list.
